name: HMS Thorgrim
events: 20 Nov 1941 Around 1015 B/20, HMS Triumph (Lt. J.S. Huddart, RN) departed from Alexandria for her 20th war patrol. She is to patrol in the Aegean and to perform a special operation.
Patrol area in the Aegean between 37°00'N / 39°30'N and west of 25°40'E.
On departure exercises were carried out with HMS Thorgrim (Lt. J.B. Sparkes, RNR) and HMS Kingston Cyanite (Skr. F.A. Yeomans, RNR). (1)
9 Feb 1942 HMS Otus (Lt. R.M. Favell, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Alexandria together with HMS Kingston Cyanite (Skr. F.A. Yeomans, RNR) and HMS Thorgrim (Lt. J.B. Sparkes, RNR). (2)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
